description:
Alienware systems lights, fans, and power control tools and apps

AWCC alternative in 500kb. You can control your system lights (including hardware and software effects such as system parameters monitoring, ambient lights, sound haptic), fans, temperatures, power settings, and a lot more.
Important! If you are using tools for the first time, please read the Beginner's guide and AlienFX-GUI readme to configure its concept and operation principle.
Fan-SDK_V1.zip have binaries built against older fan control versions; use it only in case you know what you're doing (or have Aurora R7), Check readme file inside the archive first to configure it to work!
Changes in this release:
Fan contol SDK:
- Fan RPM/Boost handling optimized for smaller code size
Fan control GUI tools:
- Fan curve draw optimized for code size. Both tools become smaller.
- Some changes in dot colors for the fan curve view - now fan points are blue, and the selected fan point is cyan.
- Added more reinforcements against tool crashes if fan control is not initialized correctly.
- Bug fixed: Tray tooltip shows incorrect power mode when system is running on battery.
- Bug fixed: Leak in GDI stopping control window updates if kept open for a long time.
